LoginForm.title: Login to your account
LoginForm.description: Enter your email below to login to your account

SignupForm.title: Create an account
SignupForm.description: Enter your information below to create your account
SignupForm.name: Full Name
SignupForm.emailDescription: We'll use this to contact you. We will not share your email
SignupForm.passwordDescription: Must be at least 8 characters long.
SignupForm.registerSuccessToast: Account created. Check your email to verify your address.

VerifyEmailSent.title: Check your email
VerifyEmailSent.description: We sent a verification link to your inbox. Open it to activate your account before signing in.
VerifyEmailSent.checkSpam: If you do not see the message within a few minutes, check your spam folder.

ForgotPasswordForm.title: Forgot password
ForgotPasswordForm.description: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
ForgotPasswordForm.successDescription: If an account exists for that address, you will receive a password reset link shortly.

AuthVerifyEmail.successDescription: Your email address is verified. You can sign in now.
AuthVerifyEmail.errorVerificationFailed: We could not verify your email. The link may have expired.

AuthResetPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid. Request a new one from the login page.
AuthResetPassword.successDescription: You can now sign in with your new password.
AuthResetPassword.formDescription: Choose a strong password you have not used elsewhere.
AuthResetPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
AuthResetPassword.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
